title: cynoglossum officinale var. umbrosum
intro: Cynoglossum officinale var. umbrosum, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not or Chinese forget me not, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum officinale var. umbrosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antitumor activity, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote natural healing.
